title: koeleria pungens
intro: Koeleria pungens, also known as June grass or prairie June grass, is a perennial grass species in the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Koeleria pungens include its potential to help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Koeleria pungens can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine, making it a valuable plant for its medicinal and health benefits.
